motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def licenseKeyFormatting(s: str, k: int) -> str:
    groups = s.split('-')
    result = ''
    for group in groups:
        if len(group) >= k:
            result += group.upper() + '-'
        else:
            result += group + '-' + group.upper()
    return result

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
